languages.text: Бортовой журнал представляет собой сплошную загадку: маршруты удалены, закодированы или ведут в необитаемые системы, грузы засекречены, а имена членов экипажа заменены на прозвища. Кто бы не был владельцем корабля, он сделал все, чтобы замести следы.

traits.locale_text: Бортовой журнал представляет собой сплошную загадку: маршруты удалены, закодированы или ведут в необитаемые системы, грузы засекречены, а имена членов экипажа заменены на прозвища. Кто бы не был владельцем корабля, он сделал все, чтобы замести следы.

languages.text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.
languages.original_text: Бортовой журнал представляет собой сплошную загадку: маршруты удалены, закодированы или ведут в необитаемые системы, грузы засекречены, а имена членов экипажа заменены на прозвища. Кто бы не был владельцем корабля, он сделал все, чтобы замести следы.

traits.locale_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

languages.text: 航行日志简直就是个谜团：航线要么被删除，要么被加密，要么就是通往无人居住的星系；货物信息已被列为机密；船员的姓名也被替换成代号。无论船主是谁，这人都费尽心思抹除了所有痕迹。
languages.original_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

traits.locale_text: 航行日志简直就是个谜团：航线要么被删除，要么被加密，要么就是通往无人居住的星系；货物信息已被列为机密；船员的姓名也被替换成代号。无论船主是谁，这人都费尽心思抹除了所有痕迹。

languages.text: El cuaderno de bitácora es todo un misterio: las rutas se han eliminado, encriptado o conducen a sistemas deshabitados; el cargamento está clasificado, y los nombres de la tripulación se han sustituido por apodos. El dueño de la nave ha hecho todo lo posible por cubrir sus pasos.
languages.original_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

traits.locale_text: El cuaderno de bitácora es todo un misterio: las rutas se han eliminado, encriptado o conducen a sistemas deshabitados; el cargamento está clasificado, y los nombres de la tripulación se han sustituido por apodos. El dueño de la nave ha hecho todo lo posible por cubrir sus pasos.

languages.text: Le contenu du journal de bord est une véritable énigme : des trajets effacés, cryptés, ou menant à des systèmes inhabités ; une cargaison classifiée, et le nom de membres d'équipage remplacés par des surnoms. Quelle que soit l'identité du propriétaire du vaisseau, il a fait de son mieux pour couvrir ses traces.
languages.original_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

traits.locale_text: Le contenu du journal de bord est une véritable énigme : des trajets effacés, cryptés, ou menant à des systèmes inhabités ; une cargaison classifiée, et le nom de membres d'équipage remplacés par des surnoms. Quelle que soit l'identité du propriétaire du vaisseau, il a fait de son mieux pour couvrir ses traces.

languages.text: Seyir defteri tam bir gizem: Rotalar silinmiş, şifrelenmiş veya ıssız sistemlere yönlendiriyor. Kargo sınıflandırılmış ve mürettebat isimleri lakaplarla değiştirilmiş. Geminin sahibi her kimse izlerini örtbas etmek için elinden geleni yapmış.
languages.original_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

traits.locale_text: Seyir defteri tam bir gizem: Rotalar silinmiş, şifrelenmiş veya ıssız sistemlere yönlendiriyor. Kargo sınıflandırılmış ve mürettebat isimleri lakaplarla değiştirilmiş. Geminin sahibi her kimse izlerini örtbas etmek için elinden geleni yapmış.

languages.text: Das Logbuch ist ein absolutes Mysterium. Routen wurden gelöscht, verschlüsselt oder führen in undenkbare Systeme. Die Fracht war geheim und die Namen der Crew wurden durch Spitznamen ersetzt. Der Besitzer des Schiffes hat sein Bestes getan, um seine Spuren zu verwischen.
languages.original_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

traits.locale_text: Das Logbuch ist ein absolutes Mysterium. Routen wurden gelöscht, verschlüsselt oder führen in undenkbare Systeme. Die Fracht war geheim und die Namen der Crew wurden durch Spitznamen ersetzt. Der Besitzer des Schiffes hat sein Bestes getan, um seine Spuren zu verwischen.

languages.text: ログブックは謎だらけ。航路は削除され、暗号化され、あるいは無人惑星系に繋がっている。貨物は分類され、乗組員の名はニックネームに置き換えられている。この船の所有者は、自分の痕跡を隠すために最善を尽くした。
languages.original_text: The logbook is a complete mystery: routes have been deleted, encrypted, or else they lead to uninhabited systems; the cargo has been classified; and crew names have been replaced with nicknames. Whoever owns the ship has done their best to cover their tracks.

traits.locale_text: ログブックは謎だらけ。航路は削除され、暗号化され、あるいは無人惑星系に繋がっている。貨物は分類され、乗組員の名はニックネームに置き換えられている。この船の所有者は、自分の痕跡を隠すために最善を尽くした。
